name: Abduction
desc: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; banish 1 monster from your Deck or Extra Deck with the same original Type, Attribute, and Level/Rank/Link Rating, and if you do, take control of that targeted monster, and if you banished a monster with the same original name, that monster's effects are negated. You can only activate 1 "Abduction" per turn.
eff: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; banish 1 monster from your Deck or Extra Deck with the same original Type, Attribute, and Level/Rank/Link Rating, and if you do, take control of that targeted monster, and if you banished a monster with the same original name, that monster's effects are negated. You can only activate 1 "Abduction" per turn.

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
